checks.name: 40_3s_consumed_correctly

checks.detail: 24 files ranked, 7 RUNTIME_SPINE, 1 RE_EXPORT_HUB, 1 UTILITY_HUB, 1 ENTRYPOINT, 3 INTERFACE_BOUNDARY, 11 VALIDATION_SUPPORT

checks.name: artifact_validation_6_of_6

checks.detail: all_files_from_source, no_negative_values, normalized_range_valid, role_coverage_complete, ranking_unique, sum_roles_equals_file_count

checks.name: create_only_enforced
checks.description: Script aborts with exit code 1 if output already exists
checks.detail: Re-run produced FATAL: output already exists (CREATE_ONLY), exit 1

checks.name: no_downstream_consumer_changes
checks.description: No DOM, pressure, binding, signal, SQO, or cockpit scripts modified

checks.name: no_authority_statement_present
checks.detail: EVIDENCE_ONLY authority level, no downstream consumers, projection NOT_EVALUATED

checks.name: false_positive_catalog_present

checks.name: pipeline_phase_ordering

checks.name: graceful_degradation_40_3s_absent
